title: Material Covers
description: Cover your precious items in Netherite so they don't burn out.
body:
Cover your items in Netherite to avoid losing them in lava or fire. They won't burn!!\
Use a Netherite Template and Netherite Ingot with the item in the Smithing Table, to cover it.

# Current items you can cover:
- Shulker Box
- Elytra
- Bow
- Brush
- Clock
- Compass
- Crossbow
- Fishing Rod
- Flint and Steal
- Mace (if 1.21 preview is enabled)
- Recovery Compass
- Trident
- Turtle Helmet
- Shears
- Shield
- Spyglass

![Netherite Covered Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbc45ecb3006538467a48bec379ce85a68c42c91.png)
